refined_question: What methods improve NLP model performance on rare words and morphologically rich languages without relying on large pre-trained models?
intent: Understand techniques to enhance NLP model accuracy for rare words and morphologically rich languages within the domain of natural language processing, focusing on small to medium model sizes
search_hint: morphological analysis, subword modeling, character-level embeddings, rare word representation, small footprint NLP, efficient neural networks, low-resource languages, NLP for morphologically rich languages
